title: mangifera khasiana
intro: Mangifera khasiana, also known as the Khasi orange mango, is a species of mango tree native to the Himalayas and the northeastern regions of India. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Mangifera khasiana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into decoctions or infusions, and it can also be used as an ingredient in traditional medicines, though further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
